data.body:
REMEDIATION ROUND (after spike 2 'laid-fjord-twirl' de-risked the empirical findings; artifacts docs/experiments/code-grounding-spike/SPIKE2_RESULTS.md, committed 75744e12).

APPLIED to the children (epic + all 6 pass clarity+check_ac; pushed):
- S2 (murky-golly-shrew): FIXED stale title (grep-ast->universal-ctags, the S2#1 advisory). Enumerated the closed reference-in `kind` set {symbol,import,dependency,file,member} (S2#0). Added the AMBIGUITY+MEMBER GUARD validated by spike E2 (naive bare name-existence false-refutes a collision=1; guard: dotted->abstain member, >1 def->abstain(ambiguous), refute only unique bare name -> 0 false-refute) — 'scope to name-existence' alone was insufficient. Yield AC now requires an INDEPENDENT real corpus (E3=88%/0-FP on rebar's own source), not a self-planted fixture.
- S3 (young-hood-notch): deps lane now empirically validated vs deps.dev (E4: 5 real refuted incl PEP503 scikit_learn, hallucinated/stdlib/slop abstained, 0 false-absent); added a deps-lane eval AC (S3#0).
- S4 (pewter-scat-slag): loader pre-validation pinned ENGINE-FAITHFUL via opengrep/semgrep --validate + ast-grep's own check (E1; S4#0); per-backend invalid-detector semantics established (metric tools have no rule schema -> N/A; S4#5); `evidence-mapping` defined concretely from spike E5 (match & abstain share {outcome,detector_id,reason,provenance_tier,job,location,coverage}, read envelope from rule.properties; S4#2); dimension-ID vocab sourced from S5 (S4#3); registry lifecycle specified (process-local, built-once+cached, mtime-invalidated; S4#1); OpenGrep+quarantine = first vertical slice (S4#4).
- S5 (saggy-easel-yarn): OWNS the closed dimension-ID vocabulary (S5#0/S4#3); gave `scan()` a typed signature (S5#1); added ACs for the .schema.json + OUTPUT_SCHEMAS + conformance-test convention (S5#3) and for refreshing CLAUDE.md MCP Reads + docs/output-schemas.md (S5#4, T7).
- S6 (webby-vane-son): corpus now REQUIRES the false-refute hazard class (common-name collision + member/dotted ref, each asserting ABSTAIN per the E2 guard; S6#0); yield eval on an INDEPENDENT real corpus not a self-planted fixture (E3; S6#1); added a deps-lane eval.

NOT actioned (the 8 DROPPED findings: S1's three, S3 gauntlet/cache/citation, S5 stable-API-evaluability, S6 corpus-wording) — Pass-2 charitably ruled them satisfied/leaf/altitude; no change needed. S1 unchanged (0 advisory). All five empirical clusters are now de-risked by real experiments, not asserted.
